name: Tex-Mex Bake
recipeIngredient: 1 can (4 oz) chopped green chilies, drained
1 cup shredded Monterey Jack cheese, divided
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine corn chips, egg, and water in a medium bowl.
2. Spread the mixture evenly on the bottom and up the sides of a 9-inch pie plate or casserole dish.
3. In a large bowl, combine the soup mix, chilies, ground beef, and half the cheese. Press the mixture evenly into the prepared crust.
4. Top with tomato sauce and green pepper.
5. Bake in a preheated 350°F oven for 30 minutes.
6. Sprinkle with the remaining cheese. Continue baking for an additional 5 minutes until the cheese is melted and the beef is cooked through.
